title: Mari Kannu Hori Myage
subTitle: Vaikuntha is a middle-class man belonging to a Brahmin family who struggles to escape from a trap of his own making created by a tiny misunderstanding.

title: Chandra
subTitle: Princess Chandravathi falls in love with her music teacher, Chandrahasa, but reluctantly becomes engaged to Arya. However, everything changes on her wedding day.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Soundarya
subTitle: An industrialist desperately seeks a way out after getting involved in scandalous mafia affairs that endanger his family's safety.

title: Mayor Prabhakar
subTitle: A small-time criminal becomes a gangster and tries to fulfil his dream of becoming the mayor. Later, he forcefully marries his lover, who tries to change his ways.

title: Ranaranga
subTitle: A juvenile delinquent, Anand, becomes a reformed adult and a qualified engineer. Thereafter, he sets out to find his estranged mother and punish the culprits who put him in jail.

title: Puksate Ganda Hotte Thumba Unda
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Sri Kalikambha
subTitle: Eshwari and Parvathi, two orphaned sisters, face numerous hardships but find solace and strength in their devotion to the Goddess and the companionship of a caring elephant.

title: Karoodpathi
subTitle: A downtrodden beggar comes across a bag full of money and decides to utilise it. He fulfils all his ambitions and wishes, however fate has other plans in store for him.

title: Sharavegada Saradara
subTitle: This story revolves around Vishwanath Rai, a wealthy person, wherein he gets cheated by his brother-in-law and dies. Years later his son Teja arrives to India for avenging his father's death.

title: Rudri
subTitle: Desperate to help her family, a girl from a poor background agrees to a temporary marriage with a wealthy man, turning her world upside down.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Operation Antha
subTitle: A courageous band of vigilantes takes on the corrupt underbelly of their city. Guided by their intrepid leader, they embark on a quest to unmask powerful crime lords, risking everything to bring justice and hope to their community.

title: Ajith
subTitle: Ajith, an unemployed man, lives a carefree life in Bangalore but his friends help him look for a job. Soon, he meets a woman called Charulatha and falls in love with her.

title: Namo Bhootatma
subTitle: A man turns his newly inherited house into a hotel. However, all his customers mysteriously turn up dead in the establishment, causing him to suspect that it might be haunted.

title: Prachanda Kulla
subTitle: King Pashupathy seeks help for his mute daughter, encountering a saint and a witch who offer assistance, leaving him to choose whose aid to accept.

title: Vamshi
subTitle: The illegitimate son of a criminal has an anger management issue. Though his mother dreams of him becoming a police officer, he ends up becoming a gangster.

title: Nee Nanna Gellare
subTitle: Srikanth wins challenges gainst Hayavadhan Rao which enrages Nalini. However, when Nalini attempts to make Srikanth loose, the two eventually fall in love and attempt to solve various family issues.

title: Jatta
subTitle: When forest guard Jatta's wife runs away with a tourist, he is not able to handle the loss and enslaves another woman in his forest home.

title: Halliyadarenu Shiva
subTitle: In a bid to marry his uncle's daughter, an unemployed young man faces several challenges and obstacles as he tries to secure a well-paying government job.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Central Jail
subTitle: Inspector Pratap arrests Arjun, a criminal, before he can kill the minister who falsely sent him to prison. However, when Arjun tells Pratap his side of the story, he is left stunned.

title: Sathyadev IPS
subTitle: Sathyadev, a dedicated police officer, takes on ruthless criminals while dealing with emotional wounds from his past, forcing him to choose between duty and personal redemption.

title: Bombat Car
subTitle: Priya gets possessed by the spirit of Savithri, who seeks revenge against the people who killed her. Savithri eventually succeeds in her quest with the help of a car and Goddess Kendaganna Kaali.

title: Bhujanga
subTitle: A petty thief robs houses to make ends meet. But his life takes a new direction when he falls in love with a young college girl, Rachana.

title: Saradara
subTitle: An orphaned guy finds a new lease on life in a village where everyone treats him like family. However, all hell breaks loose after he falls in love with the headman's daughter.

title: Auto Raja
subTitle: Smart auto driver Raja, a fan of iconic director-actor Shankar Nag, meets aspiring actress Rani from a village in the city. However, he is unaware of her multiple personality condition.
